MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Kevin Shirley, Robert Welch's Motion to Remove Case from Early Settlement Progran and order Case to Non-binding Judicial Arbitration is ordered off calendar/Failure to comply with CCP 1005 (b). Insufficient Notice. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Meuser (577.2850) for defendants and moving parties
John Shirley of J & J Vineyards (707.933.1780) for plaintiff and responding party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SOPHIE LAU AND JEFFREY LAU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer. Dowdy is not an indispensable party for he allegedly was acting as defendant's agent. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Meuser (577.2850) for defendants and moving parties
John Shirley of J & J Vineyards (707.933.1780) for plaintiff and responding party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SOPHIE LAU AND JEFFREY LAU'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. The non-attorney representation is a curable defect and no purpose would be served by sustaining the demurrer for the problem has been cured. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
